name: 个人项目（田径/游泳）
subject: pe
domain_name: 运动技能 / Movement Skills / Movement Skills
curriculum_points: Develop and execute a performance plan for an individual sport (e.g., athletics, swimming, tennis), focusing on refining technique, setting personal goals, and applying self-assessment strategies, in line with Criterion B: Planning for Performance.

Compare and contrast the physiological and psychological demands of different individual sports, explaining how training principles and mental preparation are adapted for specific activities, which connects to Criterion A: Knowing and Understanding.
